raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : American Express Failure to Provide Required Accounting Under FCBA, FCRA, and TILA What happened : Since XX/XX/year>, I have repeatedly requested a full accounting of my American Express account. American Express sent several letters acknowledging my inquiry, but none of their responses addressed the billing issues I raised. Instead, they sent letters stating that a payment was not an acceptable form of payment and closed the inquiry without providing the required accounting. 

They have not provided : a full accounting of charges, payments, fees, and interest documentation supporting the accuracy of the account written findings of a reasonable investigation any explanation addressing the billing issues I raised Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, they were required to conduct a reasonable investigation and provide written findings within two billing cycles. They did not. 

If they furnished disputed information to credit bureaus, they also violated the Fair Credit Reporting Act by failing to investigate. 

Under the Truth in Lending Act, they must provide accurate disclosures and calculations upon request. They did not.
